text: Jannik Sinner beats Novak Djokovic, to play for 2nd Wimbledon title - ESPN
fullText: Top-ranked Jannik Sinner will play for his second consecutive Wimbledon title after defeating seven-time champion Novak Djokovic 6-4, 6-4, 6-4 in the semifinals Friday.

text: Migrants who saw man killed by ICE in Houston say he did not ram officers - The Washington Post

text: Dozens hospitalized with cyclosporiasis as cases of gastrointestinal illness spike in 31 states - NBC News
fullText: Nearly 3,000 people have been sickened with a gastrointestinal illness called cyclosporiasis, a foodborne infection marked by intense, watery diarrhea, state health officials report.
